name: tender-skills
description: Portable smart-city tender assessment skillset for business, technical, cost, and bid-lead collaboration.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate tender opportunity intake and feasibility decisions
interface.longDescription: A portable workflow plugin for smart-city and digital-twin tender teams. It helps business, technical, cost-control, and bid-lead roles collect requirements, evaluate configurable solution levels, preserve project memory, and hand off a durable .tender project center across different AI agents.
defaultPrompt: Start a new digital-twin tender opportunity and create the .tender project center.
Assess feasibility and map customer needs to our configurable level model.
Restore a tender project context and tell me the next smallest action.
